title: Test WebSocket firehose
notes: WebSocket handshake works. Initial state sent on connect. Real-time commit events NOT emitted from createRecord - requires wiring up broadcastRepositoryCommit in PDSController.createRecordForDid

title: Test with pdsls.dev
notes: Cannot test with pdsls.dev - server needs to be publicly accessible. pdsls.dev runs in browser and cannot connect to localhost. To test: run 'ssh exe.dev share set-public september' and access via https://september.exe.xyz:8001

title: Store raw CBOR blocks for exact CID matching
